channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 1 com severidade Crítica
• 12 com severidade Alta
• 7 novas CVEs
• 3 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-41018 - Elastic
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
The Elasticsearch logging provider, when configured with a `host` URL that embeds credentials (for example `https://user:password@server.example.com:9200`), wrote the full host URL — including the embedded credentials — into task logs. Any user with task-log read permission could harvest the backend credentials. Users are advised to upgrade to `apache-airflow-providers-elasticsearch` 6.5.3 or later and, as a defense-...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41018
 
💣 AI Has Changed the Threat Landscape. Is Your Infrastructure Ready?
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The initial industry testing of frontier AI security models against production code is producing a wave of vulnerability findings that are orders of magnitude higher than historical norms. These models are capable of “vulnerability chaining” — chaining two or three “low-severity” vulnerabilities and combining them into a single, critical exploit path.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/11/ai-has-changed-the-threat-landscape-is-your-infrastructure-ready/
 
📰 Simplifying Storage with the New Effective Capacity View in VMware vSAN for VCF 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
In vSAN for VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) 9.1, we’ve taken an entirely new approach to capacity management that dramatically simplifies how capacity is presented to administrators. Clear and concise capacity reporting that tells you what you need to know, and in a way that you expect.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/11/effective-capacity-view-in-vsan-for-vcf-9-1/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 CVE-2026-7262 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In PHP versions 8.2.* before 8.2.31, 8.3.* before 8.3.31, 8.4.* before 8.4.21, and 8.5.* before 8.5.6, when a SOAP server has a typemap configured, the decoding process contains a mistake which checks the wrong variable in case of missing value element. This leads to dereferences a NULL pointer, causing a segmentation fault. This allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to crash the PHP SOAP server process, resulting...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7262
 
💣 Google: Hackers used AI to develop zero-day exploit for web admin tool
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Researchers at Google Threat Intelligence Group (GTIG) say that a zero-day exploit targeting a popular open-source web administration tool was likely generated using AI.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/google-hackers-used-ai-to-develop-zero-day-exploit-for-web-admin-tool/
 
💣 Your Purple Team Isn't Purple — It's Just Red and Blue in the Same Room
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Defending a network at 2 am looks a lot like this: an analyst copy-pasting a hash from a PDF into a SIEM query. A red team script is being rewritten by hand so the blue team can use it. A patch waiting on a change-approval window that's longer than the exploitation window itself.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/your-purple-team-isnt-purple-its-just.html
 
📰 Why Changing Passwords Doesn’t End an Active Directory Breach
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Resetting a password doesn't always remove attackers from Active Directory. Specops Software explains how cached credentials and Kerberos tickets can keep attackers authenticated after a reset.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/why-changing-passwords-doesnt-end-an-active-directory-breach/
 
📰 Hackers abuse Google ads, Claude.ai chats to push Mac malware
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Attackers are abusing Google Ads and legitimate Claude.ai shared chats in an active malvertising campaign. Users searching for "Claude mac download" may come across sponsored search results that list claude.ai as the target website, but lead to instructions that install malware on their Mac.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hackers-abuse-google-ads-claudeai-chats-to-push-mac-malware/
 
📰 Build Application Firewalls Aim to Stop the Next Supply Chain Attack
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: SecurityWeek
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Rather than scanning code alone, Build Application Firewalls inspect runtime behavior inside the software build pipeline.
Link: https://www.securityweek.com/build-application-firewalls-aim-to-stop-the-next-supply-chain-attack/
 
📰 Pakistan: Car bomb attack at checkpoint kills 15 - DW.com
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Check Point, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 USN-8265-1: Linux kernel (NVIDIA Tegra) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Josh Eads, Kristoffer Janke, Eduardo Vela Nava, Tavis Ormandy, and Matteo Rizzo discovered that some AMD Zen processors did not properly verify the signature of CPU microcode. A privileged attacker could possibly use this issue to cause load malicious CPU microcode causing loss of integrity and confidentiality. (CVE-2024-36347) Several security issues were discovered in the Linux kernel. An attacker could possibly us...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8265-1
 
🚨 USN-8255-2: Linux kernel (Azure) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Stonejiajia, Shir Tamari and Sagi Tzadik discovered that the OverlayFS implementation in the Ubuntu Linux kernel did not properly perform permission checks in certain situations. A local attacker could possibly use this to gain elevated privileges. (CVE-2023-2640) Shir Tamari and Sagi Tzadik discovered that the OverlayFS implementation in the Ubuntu Linux kernel did not properly perform permission checks in certain s...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8255-2
 
📰 TCLBANKER mira bancos, fintechs e corretoras no Brasil usando WhatsApp e Outlook para espalhar malware - Cyber Security Brazil
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 New TCLBanker Malware Self-Spreads Over WhatsApp and Outlook - Security Boulevard
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxNdjk3NnJpZ3FfRjJuQXBNakU0SjJtNmlMdTkwRmJBN0ZoUG1KRGF3OHdoVVBBTnE0aFYxYTk1NmRMWnJheldXQ2NiWkpjVEFySWIxUG1WMDRlQ2ptNDQ4RnVCSFBscEhXdHJydm1EdzQtSDIwcHJiaDk0U0lpX1FkNVI1empQbHg0ZUtvdDViQ1VLTEw5ZnlOVmNkaE1YR3pT?oc=5
 
📰 NBA 2K26 Patch 7.0 Adds WNBA Teams and Gameplay Updates - TwistedVoxel
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: 7.0
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Office, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTE9Id3NpZEV5YXU1dE82dHphbGFFU1N3bzY4UjhxWlpmS0JRYVdMWWhSZGxCTGhXZnJhQWQwMmN4RXRna202N0NmSVRVMTJwMWMxWTQyLXdRcw?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias dos dias 10/05/2026 e 11/05/2026.
